nodes.label: Real Chrome Browser Channel Setup
nodes.rationale: X aggressively blocks Playwright's bundled headless Chromium. To bypass this, the bot runs a real Google Chrome instance utilizing persistent user-data-dir and custom stealth scripts for window.navigator and other attributes.

nodes.label: Pre-Flight Tweet Critic Scoring
nodes.rationale: All drafts (tweets, replies, quotes, follow-ups) are evaluated 1-10 by a second critic LLM call. Scores below 7 trigger up to 3 automatic regenerations to maintain high hook strength, niche alignment, and authentic tone.

nodes.label: Randomized Cooldown Intervals
nodes.rationale: Bot actions are separated by uniform random intervals between 10 to 12 minutes to ensure human-like speed distribution, avoiding automated API fingerprints.

nodes.label: Engagement Learning Loop
nodes.rationale: Tracks the bot's own top and bottom performing tweets. Feeding both sets into subsequent prompts allows the generation system to amplify positive feedback signals and weed out low-engagement patterns.

nodes.label: Reply Candidate Analyzer
nodes.rationale: Reads candidate tweets, filters out spam, ragebait, and giveaways, then uses sentiment analysis to select the highest quality tweet for targeted reply styling.

nodes.label: Builder-centric Voice Guidelines
nodes.rationale: Formulates an authentic persona for a hands-on developer (shipping projects, short sentences, lowercase friendly, opinionated, using specific tools and metrics, avoiding buzzwords/SaaS landing page speak).

hyperedges.label: User Alignment and Quality Optimization Loop
